Full 47,979-Agent Department-Gated Runtime Fleet

Scale to the full registered Agent Command Center fleet only through approved department gates, staged unlocks, circuit breakers, and kill-switch controls.

1. Full fleet runtime status

2. Stage unlock panel

47,979 is the full fleet cap, not an automatic startup target.

Staged unlocks are required.

  • Stage 1: 5,000
  • Stage 2: 10,000
  • Stage 3: 20,000
  • Stage 4: 30,000
  • Stage 5: 40,000
  • Stage 6: 47,979

3. Cap and safety panel

Raw activate-all is disabled.

Department-gated activation is required.

Raw activate-all route: disabled
Command execution: disabled
Deploy execution: disabled
Rollback execution: disabled
Alert sending: disabled
Arbitrary shell execution: disabled

13. Kill switch / blocked activation callout

        
The kill switch pauses runtime activation; it does not execute rollback commands.

        
No department can run commands, deploys, rollbacks, alerts, shell commands, or arbitrary actions from this page.
